toc_title: Log Upload for Guest Health Reporting
title: Azure HPC Guest Health Reporting - Provide Log File
display_title: Provide diagnostic log files for Guest Health Reporting
description: Provide a log file along with guest health report.
summary: Providing a log file helps make more precise repair actions. A log file should be uploaded prior to making the guest health report (GHR), with the GHR request containing aLogUrlfield inside theadditionalPropertiessection of the request body. TheLogUrlpoints to the uploaded log file from one of the supported platform-specific diagnostic tools (for example NVidia bug report).
classification_reason: Describes a specific request body schema (LogUrl in additionalProperties) and how to integrate platform-specific diagnostic tools with Guest Health Reporting, which is product-specific API/configuration knowledge beyond generic tutorials.
